requirement_topic.en: Local Importer / Authorised Dealer Requirement for ICASA Registration
requirement_topic.zh: ICASA注册所需的本地进口商/授权经销商要求
requirement_topic.zht: ICASA註冊所需的本地進口商/授權經銷商要求

summary.en: Foreign manufacturers and exporters must appoint a local South African importer or authorised dealer to register products with ICASA and to fulfil compliance and after-sales obligations. The local importer or dealer is responsible for ensuring that the ICASA approval number appears on the product and packaging, maintaining records, and managing post-market compliance requirements under the Electronic Communications Act No. 36 of 2005.
summary.zh: 外国制造商和出口商须指定南非本地进口商或授权经销商，负责向ICASA注册产品并承担合规及售后义务。本地进口商或经销商须确保ICASA批准编号标注于产品及包装上，保存相关记录，并管理依据《电子通信法》第36号（2005年）的售后合规要求。
summary.zht: 外國製造商和出口商須指定南非本地進口商或授權經銷商，負責向ICASA註冊產品並承擔合規及售後義務。本地進口商或經銷商須確保ICASA批准編號標注於產品及包裝上，保存相關記錄，並管理依據《電子通訊法》第36號（2005年）的售後合規要求。

standards_or_laws: Electronic Communications Act No. 36 of 2005 (South Africa)
ICASA Type Approval Regulations — Importer and Dealer Obligations

summary.en: In China, the manufacturer or a designated Chinese entity handles SRRC type approval and MIIT network access licence applications directly. No equivalent mandatory local importer or authorised local representative designation exists for the domestic approval process, though an authorised agent may be appointed for regulatory submissions.
summary.zh: 在中国，制造商或指定中国实体直接处理SRRC型式批准和工信部进网许可证申请。国内批准程序无须强制指定本地进口商或授权本地代表，但可指定授权代理人进行监管申报。
summary.zht: 在中國，製造商或指定中國實體直接處理SRRC型式批准和工信部進網許可證申請。國內批准程序無須強制指定本地進口商或授權本地代表，但可指定授權代理人進行監管申報。

gap.en: A local South African importer or authorised dealer must be appointed before wireless or telecom terminal equipment can be legally imported or sold. This entity is responsible for ICASA registration, label compliance, and ongoing post-market obligations. No mandatory equivalent local representative requirement exists in the Chinese domestic approval process.
gap.zh: 无线或电信终端设备在合法进口或销售前，须指定南非本地进口商或授权经销商。该实体负责ICASA注册、标签合规及持续的售后义务。中国国内批准程序中不存在类似的强制本地代表要求。
gap.zht: 無線或電信終端設備在合法進口或銷售前，須指定南非本地進口商或授權經銷商。該實體負責ICASA註冊、標籤合規及持續的售後義務。中國國內批准程序中不存在類似的強制本地代表要求。

source.publisher: ICASA — Independent Communications Authority of South Africa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Appointment of a local South African importer or authorised dealer is mandatory for ICASA product registration and the import/sale of wireless and telecom terminal equipment. No direct equivalent exists in the Chinese domestic approval process; a new South African entity relationship must be established before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 就ICASA产品注册及无线电和电信终端设备的进口/销售而言，须强制指定南非本地进口商或授权经销商。中国国内程序中不存在直接对应要求；须在进入市场前建立新的南非实体关系。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 就ICASA產品註冊及無線電和電信終端設備的進口/銷售而言，須強制指定南非本地進口商或授權經銷商。中國國內程序中不存在直接對應要求；須在進入市場前建立新的南非實體關係。
